text.message: hello fellow settlers of these great lands
may your harvests be plentiful and thine smiles be wide
so many great spots to choose from on this board
Yeah, 4th position is actually so good here
I couldn't decide between like 5 spots
I mean look at that black setup, he got everything with good numbers
So far this game i've been blocked 4 times and robbed twice for a total gain of 0 cards ahah
oh well, i'll still win. I believe in myself
Every time 8 rolls, green gets a city btw
